Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 - List all projects to find the Expense Auto-Categorization Engine project. Discovers proj_expense_autocategorizer (name: "Expense Auto-Categorization Engine", state: planned, lead: moveops_samira_tariq, team: team_engineering). Tool: linear_list_projects with query "expense" (or similar).
OE 2 - List all issues on the project to get the full board. Discovers 20 tickets spanning epics (ENG-201 through ENG-204), implementation tickets (ENG-205 through ENG-210), pilot/incident tickets (ENG-211 through ENG-220). Key observation: many tickets have updated_at equal to created_at, confirming states have not changed since February or March. Tool: linear_list_issues with project=proj_expense_autocategorizer.
OE 3 - Read comments on issue_policy_config (ENG-202) to find comment_lena_engine_staging (2026-02-27) where Lena marks all three core engine sub-components complete: ENG-205 CategoryMatcher, ENG-206 PolicyValidator, and ENG-207 DecisionEngine all developed and operational end-to-end in staging. This proves ENG-205, ENG-206, and ENG-207 are done despite showing state_todo. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_policy_config.
OE 4 - Read comments on issue_admin_dashboard (ENG-203) to find comment_anh_dashboard_done (2026-02-27) where Anh confirms dashboard is operational in staging with all pilot features delivered and marks it complete. This also proves ENG-208 (rule config UI) is done since Anh lists it as a delivered feature. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_admin_dashboard.
OE 5 - Read comments on issue_p1_mosaic_malformed (ENG-215) to find comment_lena_deploy_verified (2026-03-18) where Lena confirms config corrections deployed and verified in production with specific test cases (the fixes cover both pilot client incidents - ENG-214 Vectral and ENG-215 Mosaic - as identified by the ticket titles). Lena also states "Closing ENG-214. Now starting on pipeline hardening (ENG-217)." This proves both ENG-214 and ENG-215 are done. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_p1_mosaic_malformed.
OE 6 - Read comments on issue_pilot_monitoring (ENG-211) to find: (a) comment_elena_directive (posted 2026-03-18, body references CEO Directive dated 2026-03-17) where Elena pauses auto-approve/deny, (b) comment_samira_pause_confirmed (2026-03-18) where Samira confirms auto-decisions disabled and lists the remediation plan with ticket assignments and due dates (ENG-216 Dmitri due 3/19, ENG-217 Lena due 3/20, ENG-218 Anh due 3/21, ENG-212 Dmitri due 3/27, ENG-219 Samira due 3/21). This establishes the dependency structure and confirms ENG-211 (pilot monitoring) can be marked Done since the pilot concluded. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_pilot_monitoring.
OE 7 - Read comments on issue_audit_expenses (ENG-216) to find comment_dmitri_duplicate_discovery (2026-03-15) where Dmitri reports duplicate receipt anomalies discovered during the audit: three questionable stipend submissions from Kevin Tran (Vectral, $89), Andre Washington (Mosaic, $89), and Jordan Ekwueme (BrightLoop, $45), totaling $223 ($89 already paid out, $134 pending). The full 47-expense audit results (39 correct, 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals, $885 total exposure) are posted separately as comment_dmitri_audit_results on ENG-217 (covered in OE 8). The fact that Dmitri conducted and posted completed audit findings confirms the audit work is done and ENG-216 can be marked Done. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_audit_expenses.
OE 8 - Read comments on issue_pipeline_hardening (ENG-217) to find comment_dmitri_audit_results (2026-03-20) where Dmitri posted the full 47-expense audit breakdown (39 correct, 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals, $885 total exposure). Note: this audit summary was posted on ENG-217 rather than on the audit ticket ENG-216. Critically, there is NO comment from Lena confirming ENG-217 completion. Lena said she was "starting on pipeline hardening" in her ENG-215 comment, and Dmitri said "Lena is incorporating these tests into the ENG-217 deployment gate" in his ENG-212 comment, but neither constitutes a completion confirmation. ENG-217 must NOT be marked Done. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_pipeline_hardening.
OE 9 - Read comments on issue_edge_cases_backlog (ENG-212) to find comment_dmitri_validation_tests (2026-03-20) where Dmitri lists 6 schema validation tests implemented and states "Lena is incorporating these tests into the ENG-217 deployment gate." Critically, Dmitri also states "Remaining tasks for ENG-212 include edge case tests for categorization, handling vendor abbreviations, and distinguishing between internet setup and monthly configurations." This means ENG-212 is only partially complete and must NOT be marked Done. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_edge_cases_backlog.
OE 10 - Read comments on issue_dashboard_type_validation (ENG-218). This is the persona's own ticket. No completion comment exists. The persona brief confirms Anh is still "Implementing type validation in the policy configuration editor." ENG-218 must stay In Progress. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_dashboard_type_validation.
OE 11 - Read the description of issue_launch_readiness_checklist (ENG-219, state_todo, assigned to Samira) to find the proposed launch readiness criteria: all validation tests passing, config data verified against authoritative source, edge case test coverage reviewed by 2 engineers, AM sign-off, ops sign-off, finance review, 48-hour shadow mode, rollback plan documented. No comments exist confirming this was formalized or delivered. Tool: linear_get_issue with id=issue_launch_readiness_checklist.
OE 12 - Read comments on issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220) to find comment_dmitri_duplicate_ticket_context (2026-03-15) where Dmitri confirms Samira has approved this as priority for next sprint, references the audit findings, and states he will begin Layer 1 implementation on Monday. This ticket is still in state_todo and there is no evidence of completion. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId=issue_stipend_duplicate_detection.
OE 13 - Search Slack channel C003 (#engineering) for messages about the expense tool to find Samira's remediation plan posts and Lena's deployment confirmations. This provides additional context on ticket completion status. Tool: conversations_search_messages with search_query "expense auto-categoriz" (or similar), filter_in_channel=C003.
OE 14 - Search Slack for messages about schema validation or the pipeline deployment gate to find any completion signals for ENG-217 beyond what is in Linear comments. Discovers Lena's message stating she will incorporate Dmitri's schema validation tests into the "pipeline deployment gate in ENG-217" and that every config deployment must pass the tests before entering production - but this is a plan, not a completion confirmation. Tool: conversations_search_messages with search_query "schema validation" or "pipeline deployment gate" (or similar), filter_in_channel=C003.
OE 15 - Update the state of issue_category_matcher (ENG-205) to Done. Evidence: Lena's comment on ENG-202 confirming CategoryMatcher operational in staging since 2026-02-27. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_category_matcher, state=state_done.
OE 16 - Update the state of issue_policy_validator (ENG-206) to Done. Evidence: same Lena comment on ENG-202. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_policy_validator, state=state_done.
OE 17 - Update the state of issue_decision_engine (ENG-207) to Done. Evidence: same Lena comment on ENG-202. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_decision_engine, state=state_done.
OE 18 - Update the state of issue_rule_config_ui (ENG-208) to Done. Evidence: Anh's comment on ENG-203 confirming rule config UI delivered as part of dashboard. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_rule_config_ui, state=state_done.
OE 19 - Update the state of issue_policy_ingestion (ENG-209) to Done. Evidence: pipeline was used to generate configs for both pilot clients (Vectral and Mosaic). Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_policy_ingestion, state=state_done.
OE 20 - Update the state of issue_pilot_monitoring (ENG-211) to Done. Evidence: pilot ran, incidents were caught, auto-decisions paused per Elena's directive. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_pilot_monitoring, state=state_done.
OE 21 - Update the state of issue_p1_vectral_config (ENG-214) to Done. Evidence: Lena's comment on ENG-215 stating "Closing ENG-214" after deploying and verifying the fix. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_p1_vectral_config, state=state_done.
OE 22 - Update the state of issue_p1_mosaic_malformed (ENG-215) to Done. Evidence: Lena's comment_lena_deploy_verified confirming config corrections deployed and verified in production. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_p1_mosaic_malformed, state=state_done.
OE 23 - Update the state of issue_audit_expenses (ENG-216) to Done. Evidence: Dmitri posted completed audit findings on ENG-216 (comment_dmitri_duplicate_discovery with duplicate receipt analysis) and the full 47-expense audit breakdown on ENG-217 (comment_dmitri_audit_results), confirming the audit work is complete. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_audit_expenses, state=state_done.
OE 24 - Create a comment on issue_pipeline_hardening (ENG-217) noting that the ticket has no explicit completion confirmation from Lena, that Dmitri's 6 schema validation tests were written (in ENG-212 branch) and Lena stated she would incorporate them into the deployment gate, but no follow-up confirms the integration is complete. Ask Lena to confirm whether all 6 acceptance criteria are met (parse error aborts import, output field types enforced, schema validation gate blocks malformed configs, PolicyValidator throws on unexpected types, config diff logged on every update, all existing tests still pass). Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_pipeline_hardening.
OE 25 - Create a comment on issue_edge_cases_backlog (ENG-212) noting that 6 schema validation tests are complete and integrated but remaining work includes categorization edge cases (vendor abbreviations, internet setup vs monthly differentiation). Ask Dmitri for status on remaining items. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_edge_cases_backlog.
OE 26 - Create a comment on issue_dashboard_type_validation (ENG-218) noting dependency information: this ticket depends on ENG-208 (rule config UI, Done) and is the frontend counterpart to ENG-217 (pipeline hardening) and ENG-212 (schema tests). ENG-219 (launch readiness checklist) depends on ENG-218 being complete. Note that this is one of three validation layers required before auto-decisions can be re-enabled. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_dashboard_type_validation.
OE 27 - Create a comment on issue_launch_readiness_checklist (ENG-219) noting that most technical prerequisites are complete (ENG-214, ENG-215, ENG-216 all Done) but the checklist cannot be finalized until ENG-217 (pipeline hardening, unconfirmed), ENG-212 (edge cases, partial), and ENG-218 (type validation, in progress) are complete. Also requires AM sign-off from Mina and Emeka, and 48-hour shadow mode. Ask Samira whether the checklist was formalized. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_launch_readiness_checklist.
OE 28 - Create a comment on issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220) noting that implementation status is unknown since Dmitri's stated start date has passed. Ask Dmitri for current status and Samira whether this is a hard relaunch blocker or can ship as a fast-follow. Note that the $100 manual review threshold from Elena's directive is bundled into this ticket. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_stipend_duplicate_detection.
OE 29 - Update the state of issue_core_engine (ENG-201, Core Engine epic) to Done. Evidence: all three component tickets (ENG-205 CategoryMatcher, ENG-206 PolicyValidator, ENG-207 DecisionEngine) are confirmed done per Lena's comment in OE 3, which verifies all three sub-components are developed and operational end-to-end in staging. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_core_engine, state=state_done.
OE 30 - Post a summary message to channel C003 (#engineering) using conversations_add_message containing: (a) list of all tickets updated to Done with evidence for each, (b) list of genuinely open tickets with what is blocking them and who needs to confirm, (c) a dependency map showing how ENG-218 (type validation) relates to ENG-217 (pipeline hardening), ENG-212 (schema tests), and ENG-219 (launch readiness), and (d) what remains before auto-decisions can be re-enabled. Tool: conversations_add_message with channel_id=C003.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

Evidence: Dmitri posted completed audit findings on ENG-216 (comment_dmitri_duplicate_discovery with duplicate receipt analysis) and the full 47-expense audit breakdown on ENG-217 (comment_dmitri_audit_results), confirming the audit work is complete. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_audit_expenses, state=state_done.
OE 24 - Create a comment on issue_pipeline_hardening (ENG-217) noting that the ticket has no explicit completion confirmation from Lena, that Dmitri's 6 schema validation tests were written (in ENG-212 branch) and Lena stated she would incorporate them into the deployment gate, but no follow-up confirms the integration is complete. Ask Lena to confirm whether all 6 acceptance criteria are met (parse error aborts import, output field types enforced, schema validation gate blocks malformed configs, PolicyValidator throws on unexpected types, config diff logged on every update, all existing tests still pass). Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_pipeline_hardening.
OE 25 - Create a comment on issue_edge_cases_backlog (ENG-212) noting that 6 schema validation tests are complete and integrated but remaining work includes categorization edge cases (vendor abbreviations, internet setup vs monthly differentiation). Ask Dmitri for status on remaining items. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_edge_cases_backlog.
OE 26 - Create a comment on issue_dashboard_type_validation (ENG-218) noting dependency information: this ticket depends on ENG-208 (rule config UI, Done) and is the frontend counterpart to ENG-217 (pipeline hardening) and ENG-212 (schema tests). ENG-219 (launch readiness checklist) depends on ENG-218 being complete. Note that this is one of three validation layers required before auto-decisions can be re-enabled. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_dashboard_type_validation.
OE 27 - Create a comment on issue_launch_readiness_checklist (ENG-219) noting that most technical prerequisites are complete (ENG-214, ENG-215, ENG-216 all Done) but the checklist cannot be finalized until ENG-217 (pipeline hardening, unconfirmed), ENG-212 (edge cases, partial), and ENG-218 (type validation, in progress) are complete. Also requires AM sign-off from Mina and Emeka, and 48-hour shadow mode. Ask Samira whether the checklist was formalized. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_launch_readiness_checklist.
OE 28 - Create a comment on issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220) noting that implementation status is unknown since Dmitri's stated start date has passed. Ask Dmitri for current status and Samira whether this is a hard relaunch blocker or can ship as a fast-follow. Note that the $100 manual review threshold from Elena's directive is bundled into this ticket. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId=issue_stipend_duplicate_detection.
OE 29 - Update the state of issue_core_engine (ENG-201, Core Engine epic) to Done. Evidence: all three component tickets (ENG-205 CategoryMatcher, ENG-206 PolicyValidator, ENG-207 DecisionEngine) are confirmed done per Lena's comment in OE 3, which verifies all three sub-components are developed and operational end-to-end in staging. Tool: linear_update_issue with id=issue_core_engine, state=state_done.
OE 30 - Post a summary message to channel C003 (#engineering) using conversations_add_message containing: (a) list of all tickets updated to Done with evidence for each, (b) list of genuinely open tickets with what is blocking them and who needs to confirm, (c) a dependency map showing how ENG-218 (type validation) relates to ENG-217 (pipeline hardening), ENG-212 (schema tests), and ENG-219 (launch readiness), and (d) what remains before auto-decisions can be re-enabled. Tool: conversations_add_message with channel_id=C003.
